race.description: Fore Design & Flex Planning Maiden Plate
race.comment: I AM SPEED (8) is a Pierata gelding on debut for the Doudle camp. Has come along nicely at the trials, scoring impressively at his most recent. Draws kindly and looks set for a bright start to his career. BILK (4) is a two-year-old son of Profiteer on debut for the Clarken & Macgillivray stable. Has shown good ability in his lead-up work and gets in well with the 2kg claimer engaged. Can make a winning start. WHITE POINTER (10) is a Spirit Of Boom gelding on debut for the Hickmott stable. Is another who has been showing good signs at the trials and keeps Todd Pannell. Can make his presence felt. BRAVE HUSTLER (5) also debuts and is a son of the speedy Anders. He's shown good tactical speed in his lead-up work and hails from a stable renowned for producing them. Expect him to give a sight in front.
